title: tabernaemontana aurantiaca f. anguinea
intro: Tabernaemontana aurantiaca f. angustifolia, also known as Yellow Tabernaemontana or Angustifolia Yellow Tabernaemontana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with the use of Tabernaemontana aurantiaca f. angustifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, although it's worth noting that more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
